## Summary

## Catalog Review Checklist

- [ ] `mise run skill:catalog-validate` passes.
- [ ] Package ids and install targets are stable and unique.
- [ ] Recommended packages include a factual rationale.
- [ ] User-scope recommendations include a scope rationale.
- [ ] Recipes and extension profiles are advisory only.
- [ ] No automatic install, removal, or hard pinning behavior was added.
- [ ] Risky behavior is disclosed: network, shell, filesystem, credentials, MCP, or prompt/tool behavior changes.
- [ ] New recommendations do not reference blocked or deprecated catalog entries.
